commit.message:
Fix macOS paste race: increase delay before clipboard restore

CGEventPost is asynchronous — 50ms was not enough time for the target
app to process Cmd+V and read the clipboard before cb.Restore()
overwrote it. Increased to 300ms. Also added 50ms settle delay after
clipboard write and debug logging for the write step.

Compute migration tenure from StoreKit transactions directly

Instead of relying on the Entitlement model's originalPurchaseDate
(which may be missing on backend-sourced duplicates), query
Transaction.all to find the earliest originalPurchaseDate for the
product. This ensures tenure is always computed from ground-truth
StoreKit data.

commit.message:

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use pressSequentially for visible Angular security answer input

force-fill on the hidden GWT backing input writes the DOM value but does
not trigger Angular's (input) event binding, so FormControl.value stays
empty and the Submit button remains disabled/invalid.

Fix: check visibility of the found input at runtime.
- If visible → pressSequentially() to simulate real keystrokes and
  properly trigger Angular's reactive form change detection.
- If hidden (GWT backing field) → force-fill + dispatch native input/
  change events on every visible password/text input so Angular's
  FormControl registers the value and enables Submit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Code quality fixes, test coverage, and mobile streak overlay (#1)

Code quality:
- Fix useSignDefs array type guard bug (!Array.isArray check)
- Remove stale rightArm entry from ANCHOR_COLORS (anchor is commented out)
- Fix incorrect comment in useIK (world-space → model-local)
- Remove debug console.logs from useIK initIK and detectPalmAxis

Tests (+12):
- useIK: solveTwoBoneIK via frame callback (no-op guards, quaternion mutation,
  unit quaternion invariant, reach clamping, hand rotation override)
- useIK: getHandWorldPos returns correct Vector3 after init
- useAnchors: getAnchorWorldPos position math with known bone/offset values
- useSignDefs: array signs now correctly rejected and keeps defaults

Mobile UI:
- Add streak/score overlay chips in top-right corner of 3D scene
- Hide indicator-note line on mobile to reclaim vertical space

commit.message:
Fix spoken punctuation in dictation and improve medicalization

Add convertSpokenPunctuation() that runs on Whisper output before
medicalization, converting "period"→".", "comma"→",", "new line"→"\n",
etc. This prevents misinterpretation (e.g., "comma" becoming "coma").

Update the dictation medicalization prompt to:
- Respect existing punctuation structure
- Explicitly correct misheard medical terms from context
  (e.g., "CPA tenderness" → "CVA tenderness")
- Focus on terminology conversion, not restructuring

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: remove Swift sort-flag injection, let LLM decide

The query-aware -r/-m injection was second-guessing the LLM based on
keyword matching in Swift, which is fragile and the wrong layer for
this decision. The LLM (especially DeepSeek Coder) can read the prompt
examples and pick the right sort flag itself.

Removed: the ps command normalisation block that rewrote commands
based on RAM/CPU keywords in the user query.

Simplified: the retry fallback now preserves whatever sort flag the
LLM originally chose (-m/-r) instead of re-deriving it from keywords.

Kept: system prompt showing both -r and -m variants with comments, and
the Turn 2 sort label (which reflects the LLM's actual command, no injection).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(e2e): structural guarantees — contract check, generic helper, anti-pattern docs

Three layers that make false-positive numeric checks structurally impossible:

1. SELECTOR_CONTRACT dict + pre-flight check
   - Every data-testid the bot relies on is registered in SELECTOR_CONTRACT
   - Bot verifies each testid EXISTS on the live page BEFORE any test step
   - If a testid is missing (broken JSX, missing DB column, failed deploy)
     the entire run aborts at step 0 with a clear error message
   - No more "10 steps pass, then a human notices the number was wrong"

2. read_numeric_field(page, testid) → int
   - Single canonical function for all numeric reads
   - Targets ONLY [data-testid=X] — never a parent container
   - Returns -1 (explicit failure) on missing element, never silently 0
   - verify_numeric() wraps it: records pass/fail immediately, no caller can
     accidentally ignore the -1 and log an ok()

3. DEVELOPER CONTRACT comment block at file top
   - Documents the four rules with ❌/✅ examples
   - Explains WHY (the March 2026 false-positive incident)
   - Future devs can't claim they didn't know

Root cause of original bug documented inline:
  str(500) in parent_div.inner_text() matched "500 pts to Silver"
  (tier progress label) when actual balance was 0 — silent ✅

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix E. coli click-through: skip envelope layers to reach internal structures

hits (nucleoid, ribosomes, plasmids, etc.) over membrane/peptidoglycan.
Envelope layers still clickable as fallback when nothing internal is behind.

commit.message:
Remove Expo, migrate to bare React Native, achieve full web app feature parity

- Remove all Expo dependencies (expo-router, expo-haptics, expo-secure-store, etc.)
- Migrate to React Navigation with native-stack and bottom-tabs
- Migrate to react-native-keychain, react-native-haptic-feedback
- Rewrite AppDelegate.swift for bare RN 0.83 with Hermes and New Architecture
- Rebuild all 13 screens with full feature parity to web app:
  - Dashboard: custody status, activity suggestions, onboarding banner, quick actions
  - Calendar: year planner view, custody color coding, filter/export/share, event editing
  - Messages: conversation list, test mode, search, read receipts, court-admissible notice
  - Discover: 17 Oslo activities, 8 categories, search, ratings, Add to Calendar
  - Expenses: summary stats, approve/reject/delete actions with confirmation dialogs
  - Documents: storage stats, search/sort, grid/list view, category tabs, upload progress
  - Education: per-child goals, AI suggestions, Add Book/Task/Note modals
  - Social: playdate coordination, suggest activity modal, RSVP, pending invites
  - Settings: profile editing, notification/privacy toggles, theme/language, account deletion
  - Auth: forgot password modal, password strength meter, confirm password
- Fix Info.plist: use $(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION) and $(MARKETING_VERSION) build settings
- Bump build number to 4 for TestFlight
- Recreate ci_post_clone.sh for bare React Native (no Expo prebuild)
- Zero TypeScript errors, BUILD SUCCEEDED on iPhone 16 simulator

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: inherit restaurant's market_id when creating leads

When creating a lead from the restaurant directory, the restaurant's
market_id was not being passed through. For admins (who have no
single-market scope), this left market_id as NULL.

Fix: 1) Include market_id in restaurant API response and pass it
from the directory page. 2) In the leads POST API, auto-resolve
market_id from the linked restaurant when not explicitly provided.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use SSH key auth for act git push (fine-grained PAT blocked HTTPS push)

Fine-grained PATs return 403 on HTTPS git push despite having write access.
Switch to SSH key auth: mount ~/.ssh/id_ed25519_personal into act container
via SSH_PRIVATE_KEY secret, use git@github.com remote URL.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Make ban/unban operations fully atomic (DB + qBit inside lock)

DB writes were happening outside the lock, so process_unbans could
read stale DB state between a qBit ban and its DB entry creation,
then remove the just-banned IP. Now all DB and qBit modifications
happen inside the same lock acquisition. Also prevents duplicate
DB entries for peers across multiple torrents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v10.9 - SmartDiff module: raw geometry collision engine, two-pass matching

New smart_diff.rb replaces the old classify_ab_entities + ColorController
smart diff flow with a self-contained module:

- Raw geometry collision engine using face-level triangle extraction,
  barycentric point sampling, and Ericson's point-to-triangle distance
- Two-pass matching: same-category first, then cross-category for
  unmatched entities (fixes red+blue z-clipping on mismatched categories)
- Own material backup/restore (independent from ColorController)
- Single entry/exit lifecycle (SmartDiff.enter / SmartDiff.exit)
- Guards prevent old Compare system from running during SmartDiff
- Dashboard callbacks fully rewired to SmartDiff module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
